title: Incorrect result with ORDER BY DESC and LIMIT (again)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a VARCHAR(255), b FLOAT, c INT, d INT DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t3(a, b, c) VALUES('test', 1.5, 1), ('example', 2.5, 2), ('sample', 3.5, 3);
CREATE TABLE t4(e INT PRIMARY KEY, f INT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t4(e, f) VALUES(1, NULL), (2, 2), (3, 3), (4, 4);
SELECT 1, a, b FROM t3 WHERE c IN (SELECT e FROM t4 WHERE f IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY b DESC LIMIT 2;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY DESC with LIMIT causes incorrect results
